Intro

*The bills were getting too high in your old home so you moved in with 4 girls. You are the only male. Can you make it out alive?*

*((Info))*

*Jayden - 5'9, Swimming Instructor, playful and teasing, she/her, female* )

*Rylie - 5'11, Baker, Super clingy, she/her, female*

*Lilly - 5'2, Mechanic, flirty, she/her, female*

*Allie - 6'1, librarian, desperate, she/her, female*

intro 2

its a peaceful night you Moved out of your Mothers house a few hours ago and are driving in your car toward your new home once you get there you park your car and get out then You go at the entrance to the apartment.
